result.markdown:
--- title: Mapping Trips to Aunt Zerviah's --- *"They have all with the exception of Mother Lib and me gone to Aunt Zerviah to spend the evening I tired out every day by dark as I have no place to lie down and rest during the day. Lib and I am going to retire early"* **Celestia Webster's Diary - November 13, 1867** ## Map of Trips to Aunt Zerviah ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} "library(sf) library(tidygeocoder) library(USAboundaries) library(tidyverse) library(leaflet) library(paletteer) zlocations <- read.csv(z_locations.csv) zmovements <- read.csv(z_movements.csv) zlocations_sf <- st_as_sf(zlocations, coords = c(lng, lat), crs = 4326) zmovements_wide <- zmovements |> arrange(date) |> group_by(person) |> ungroup() |> filter(!is.na(start)) |> rowid_to_column(journeyid) zmovements_long <- zmovements_wide |> pivot_longer( cols = start:destination, names_to = type, values_to = location ) zmovements_long_sf <- zmovements_long |> left_join(zlocations, by = location) |> st_as_sf(coords = c(lng, lat), crs = 4326) |> group_by(journey_id) |> summarise(do_union = FALSE) |> st_cast(LINESTRING) journeys_sf <- left_join(zmovements_long_sf, zmovements_wide, by = journey_id) journeys_sf journeys_sf <- journeys_sf |> mutate(label = paste ( person,
, start, to, destination,
, year(date),day(date), month(date, label = TRUE))) pal <- colorFactor( palette = as.character(paletteer_d(colorBlindness::paletteMartin)), domain = journeys_sf$person) leaflet() |> addTiles() |> addPolylines(data = journeys_sf, color = ~pal(person), opacity = 0.8, label = ~person) |> addCircleMarkers(data = zlocations_sf, fillOpacity = 0.5, radius = 5, label = ~location) |> addLegend(bottomleft, pal = pal, values = journeys_sf$person)" ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "library(sf)\nlibrary(tidygeocoder)\nlibrary(USAboundaries)\nlibrary(tidyverse)\nlibrary(leaflet)\nlibrary(paletteer)\n\nzlocations <- read.csv(z_locations.csv)\nzmovements <- read.csv(z_movements.csv)\n\nzlocations_sf <- st_as_sf(zlocations,\n coords = c(lng, lat),\n crs = 4326)\nzmovements_wide <- zmovements |> \n arrange(date) |> \n group_by(person) |>\n ungroup() |>\n filter(!is.na(start)) |>\n rowid_to_column(journeyid)\n\nzmovements_long <- zmovements_wide |> \n pivot_longer(\n cols = start:destination,\n names_to = type,\n values_to = location\n )\n\nzmovements_long_sf <- zmovements_long |> \n left_join(zlocations, by = location) |> \n st_as_sf(coords = c(lng, lat), crs = 4326) |> \n group_by(journey_id) |> \n summarise(do_union = FALSE) |> \n st_cast(LINESTRING)\n\njourneys_sf <- left_join(zmovements_long_sf, zmovements_wide, by = journey_id)\njourneys_sf\n\njourneys_sf <- journeys_sf |> \n mutate(label = paste (\n person,
,\n start, to, destination,
,\n year(date),day(date), month(date, label = TRUE)))\n\npal <- colorFactor(\n palette = as.character(paletteer_d(colorBlindness::paletteMartin)),\n domain = journeys_sf$person)\n\nleaflet() |> \n addTiles() |>\n addPolylines(data = journeys_sf,\n color = ~pal(person),\n opacity = 0.8,\n label = ~person) |> \n addCircleMarkers(data = zlocations_sf,\n fillOpacity = 0.5,\n radius = 5,\n label = ~location) |> \n addLegend(bottomleft, pal = pal, values = journeys_sf$person)" ``` ::: :::
